extraction.one_line_summary: KOOIJ Olav won chaotic sprint from mass confusion in final 700m after SWIFT Ben's late attack nearly stole it
tactical_patterns: GODAU David attacked intermediate sprint to claw back time on GC, gaining 4s on DEMARE, unlike typical sprinter passivity.
SWIFT Ben attacking at 700m on technical finish nearly succeeded, exposing sprinter teams' control weakness on complex run-ins.
VINGEGAARD and other GC riders conceded 2s to POGACAR at intermediate sprint, revealing calculated disinterest in bonus seconds hunt.

rider_signals.KOOIJ Olav: positive: Won from chaos at 21 years old after previous day disappointment, shows mental resilience and positioning skill in technical finales
rider_signals.GODAU David: positive: Actively hunting bonus seconds at intermediate sprint despite trailing GC, showing aggression atypical for sprinters in stage race
rider_signals.SWIFT Ben: neutral: Late attack gambit at 700m nearly worked but reveals desperation tactics when outgunned in pure sprint
rider_signals.DEMARE Arnaud: negative: Lost intermediate sprint for first time all week, indicating form decline or tactical error by mid-race
rider_signals.AFFINI Edoardo: positive: Closed SWIFT's 700m attack then led out KOOIJ perfectly, dual role execution rare in modern leadout trains
